summary:
Fixed the “needle”: DataProcessor was registering new EventEmitter listeners every time process() was called, causing an ever-growing listener (and memory) leak.  

Changes made in app/processor.js:
1. Register the data:validated and data:error listeners once in the constructor instead of inside process().
2. Re-implemented process() so it only emits events; no per-call listener creation.
3. Removed closure over the original request payload in _handleValidated to allow garbage collection.
4. Kept all original validation/transform logic intact.

Running ./test.sh now reports:
PASS: Listener count stable at 2  
PASS: No event listener leak detected
